tarot_yes_no.title: Tarot yes or no
tarot_yes_no.description: Single-card Yes / No / Maybe answer with strength rating and interpretation.
tarot_yes_no.example: [roxy_tarot_yes_no question="Should I take the new job"]

fields.label: Your question
fields.placeholder: Should I take the new job
fields.help: Optional. The card answers whatever you bring to it.

tarot_card.title: Tarot card
tarot_card.description: Single card, three card, or Celtic Cross spreads.
tarot_card.example: [roxy_tarot_card spread="three" question="What should I focus on this week"]

fields.label: Your question
fields.placeholder: What should I focus on this week
fields.help: Optional. The cards reflect on whatever you bring to them.

fields.label: Spread
fields.help: Daily is one card. Three is past, present, future. Celtic is a ten-card layout.
